meta_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Git with AI to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Struggling with no project ideas? Learn how to use Git with AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to validate and ship your SaaS MVP faster.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Use AI to analyze market gaps, generate technical architecture, and scaffold your MVP directly into Git. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for iterative development, you transform raw concepts into deployable, revenue-ready SaaS products in record time.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the drive to build a SaaS empire, but the 'idea drought' keeps you paralyzed, watching others capture market share while you iterate on nothing. This isn't a failure of creativity; it is a failure of process.

True engineering velocity comes when you stop thinking in silos and start treating AI as your lead developer. By integrating AI directly into your Git workflow, you bridge the gap between abstract concepts and production-ready code. It is time to stop dreaming and start shipping.

steps.title: Market Gap Synthesis
steps.description: Use AI to analyze current industry trends and identify high-monetization niches that lack robust software solutions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current SaaS market trends in the B2B productivity space and identify three underserved micro-niches. For each, propose a lean MVP feature set that solves a specific, high-value pain point.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Research and document 3 high-ARR potential SaaS micro-niches based on current market trends'

steps.title: Technical Architecture Mapping
steps.description: Convert your validated niche into a scalable architecture document, ensuring your stack supports fast iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean technical architecture document for a SaaS MVP targeting [chosen niche]. Use a Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind stack. Include a database schema and core API route definitions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate architecture.md and schema.sql based on the approved MVP feature set'

steps.title: Boilerplate Scaffolding
steps.description: Initialize your Git repository and scaffold the core application structure to minimize setup time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a directory structure and initial boilerplate code for a Next.js application based on the architecture document. Include authentication and basic layout components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Scaffold the project structure, initialize git, and commit the initial boilerplate'

steps.title: Iterative Feature Implementation
steps.description: Build individual features one by one, using AI to write code that adheres to your established architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the implementation for the user dashboard component, ensuring it fetches data from the Supabase API and handles loading states effectively.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the dashboard component; ensure it follows the project coding standards and commit with a clear message'

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Use AI to audit your code for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks before your first deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit on the codebase. Identify potential bottlenecks in the API routes and suggest optimizations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Audit the codebase for security vulnerabilities and suggest performance improvements in a new branch'

pro_tips: Always commit your AI-generated prompts into a /docs/prompts folder in your repo to keep a traceable history of your product logic.
Use Claude Code to automate your commit messages by providing context about the specific feature implemented in that session.
Treat your Git branch as a feature-flagged environment; use AI to help manage branch merges to avoid regression in your MVP.
Run periodic 'Architecture Refinement' prompts to ensure your growing codebase doesn't drift from your initial lean vision.
Focus on 'Time-to-First-Dollar' metrics; use AI to build payment gateway integrations before you build complex UI elements.
resources: Git Best Practices for SaaS: https://git-scm.com/doc
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is scaffolded, deploy to Vercel, set up your Stripe dashboard, and start your private beta testing with 5-10 users to validate your monetization model.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the process to turn a blank screen into a profitable business. Stop waiting for inspiration and start engineering your future. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
